text: Standing in the midst of this modern, open space, I feel a curious sense of anticipation. The clean lines and soft lighting evoke a contemplative mood. Surrounded by symbols of safety and order, I am aware of structure and purpose. In the next space, vibrant colors and bold letters—R + D—suggest innovation and exploration. Screens and text draw me into reflections on humanity and technology. I feel inspired and thoughtful, as if I am at the threshold of discovery, eager to participate in deeper inquiry and creative engagement with the world around me.
